Title: User logs in successfully
Test Steps:
1. User enters username and password
2. User clicks login button
Expected Result: User is logged in and redirected to the home page

Title: Admin logs in successfully
Test Steps:
1. Admin enters username and password
2. Admin clicks login button
Expected Result: Admin is logged in and redirected to the admin dashboard

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Test Steps:
1. User enters incorrect username and password
2. User clicks login button
Expected Result: Error message displayed, user remains on login page

Title: User logs out successfully
Test Steps: 1. User clicks logout button
Expected Result: User is logged out and redirected to the login page

Title: User views a product successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page
2. User selects the product to view
Expected Result: Product details are displayed

Title: Admin edits a product successfully
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, product exists
Test Data: product name = "Sample Product", new description = "Updated Description"
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the product page
2. Admin selects the product to edit
3. Admin updates the product description
4. Admin saves changes
Expected Result: Product description is updated

Title: User adds a product to cart successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the product page
2. User selects the product to add to cart
3. User clicks "Add to Cart"
Expected Result: Product added to cart, confirmation message displayed

Title: User removes a product from cart successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists in cart
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the cart page
2. User selects the product to remove
3. User clicks "Remove from Cart"
Expected Result: Product removed from cart, confirmation message displayed

Title: User calculates total cart cost successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, cart contains products
Test Steps:
1. User navigates to the cart page
2. User clicks "Calculate Total"
Expected Result: Total cost of $60 is displayed

Title: Admin places an order successfully
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, cart contains products
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the cart page
2. Admin clicks "Place Order"
Expected Result: Order placed, confirmation message displayed

Title: Admin cancels an order successfully
Preconditions: Admin is logged in, order exists
Test Steps:
1. Admin navigates to the order page
2. Admin selects the order to cancel
3. Admin clicks "Cancel Order"
Expected Result: Order canceled, confirmation message displayed

Title: User sends a request to the server successfully
Test Steps: 1. User sends a request to the server
Expected Result: Server processes the request and returns a response

Title: Server queries the database successfully
Preconditions: Server is connected to the database
Test Steps: 1. Server queries the database
Expected Result: Database returns the requested data

Title: Server sends a response to the user successfully
Test Steps: 1. Server sends a response to the user
Expected Result: User receives the response

Title: User manages notification successfully
Test Steps:
1. User triggers the notification management process
2. Notification is sent to the user
Expected Result: User receives the notification

Title: User adds a new product successfully
Test Steps:
1. User adds a new product to the system
2. System updates the product list
3. System displays the updated product list
Expected Result: New product is added and displayed in the product list

Title: User removes a product successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. User removes a product from the system
2. System updates the product list
3. System displays the updated product list
Expected Result: Product is removed and not displayed in the product list

Title: User updates a product successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Data: product name = "Existing Product", new price = 19.99, new description = "Updated Description"
Test Steps:
1. User updates a product in the system
2. System updates the product list
3. System displays the updated product list
Expected Result: Product details are updated and displayed in the product list

Title: User retrieves a product successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, product exists
Test Steps:
1. User retrieves a product from the system
2. System displays the product details
Expected Result: Product details are displayed

Title: User clicks on 'aggungimentoProdotto'
Test Steps: 1. User clicks on 'aggungimentoProdotto'
Expected Result: AggungimentoProdotto class is invoked, product aggregation process begins

Title: User triggers Premuto operation
Test Steps: 1. User triggers Premuto operation
Expected Result: Premuto operation is executed, initiating notification process

Title: User sends a notification successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in, notification content prepared
Test Steps: 1. User sends a notification
Expected Result: Notification is sent to the intended recipient

Title: User attempts invalid operation
Test Steps: 1. User attempts to perform an invalid operation
Expected Result: Error message displayed, operation fails
